name: Eligibility Checker Page
summary: Interactive question flow that determines if a user qualifies for a service before they start an application.
whenToUse: Reduce wasted effort on ineligible applications
Help users self-assess before committing to a full form

structure.intro: Brief explanation of what the checker assesses
structure.questions: Progressive disclosure - one question visible at a time or grouped logically
structure.result: Clear eligible/not eligible outcome with next steps

requiredElements: Simple yes/no or multiple choice questions
Next steps for both eligible and ineligible users
stateManagement: Use useState to track answers, derive eligibility from answers

imports: import { GoabOneColumnLayout, GoabAppHeader, GoabPageBlock, GoabButton, GoabCallout, GoabRadioGroup, GoabRadioItem, GoabAppFooter } from '@abgov/react-components';

notes: Keep questions simple - prefer yes/no over open text
Show result immediately, don't require submission to a server
Always provide next steps for both outcomes
This is a screening tool, not a guarantee of eligibility
